'''naloko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foamcore|foamcore]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foamcore|foamcore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| naloko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næleketh|næleketh]] || [[word:nælekej|nælekej]] || [[word:nælekesh|nælekesh]] || [[word:næleke|næleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalolokoth|nalolokoth]] || [[word:nalolokoj|nalolokoj]] || [[word:nalolokosh|nalolokosh]] || [[word:naloloko|naloloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalokoth|nalokoth]] || [[word:nalokoj|nalokoj]] || [[word:nalokosh|nalokosh]] || [[word:naloko|naloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalofkoth|nalofkoth]] || [[word:nalofkoj|nalofkoj]] || [[word:nalofkosh|nalofkosh]] || [[word:nalofkof|nalofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalokotho|nalokotho]] || [[word:nalokojo|nalokojo]] || [[word:nalokosho|nalokosho]] || [[word:nalokoko|nalokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalokoth|nalokoth]] || [[word:nalokoj|nalokoj]] || [[word:nalokosh|nalokosh]] || [[word:naloko|naloko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalokothol|nalokothol]] || [[word:nalokojol|nalokojol]] || [[word:nalokoshol|nalokoshol]] || [[word:nalokokol|nalokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalokothotho|nalokothotho]] || [[word:nalokojojo|nalokojojo]] || [[word:nalokoshosho|nalokoshosho]] || [[word:nalokoko|nalokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalokothon|nalokothon]] || [[word:nalokojon|nalokojon]] || [[word:nalokoshon|nalokoshon]] || [[word:nalokokon|nalokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalokothoro|nalokothoro]] || [[word:nalokojoro|nalokojoro]] || [[word:nalokoshoro|nalokoshoro]] || [[word:nalokokoro|nalokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
